channel.title: Graphic Design on EasyHRcomms

item.title: 5 Graphic Design Tips for Non-Designers
item.author: youremail@domain.com (Some Person)
item.description:
Creating visually appealing graphics doesn’t require a degree in design. Whether you’re crafting social media posts, presentations, or flyers, these simple tips can help you elevate your work and make it look professional—even if you’re not a designer.

1. Stick to a Simple Color Palette

Less is more when it comes to colors. Choose 2-3 complementary colors and use them consistently throughout your design. Tools like Coolors or Adobe Color can help you find harmonious color schemes. Avoid using too many bright or clashing colors, as they can overwhelm the viewer.
